name: Enhancement request
about: Suggest an improvement for this project

---
**Checklist**

- [ ] I searched existing [Issues](https://github.com/hwdsl2/docker-ai-stack/issues?q=is%3Aissue), and did not find a similar enhancement request
- [ ] I read the [README](https://github.com/hwdsl2/docker-ai-stack/blob/main/README.md) or the relevant stack README

**Describe the enhancement request**
A clear and concise description of your enhancement request.

**Problem or use case**
What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

**Area**
- [ ] Overall stack
- [ ] Lightweight stack under `stacks/`
- [ ] Compose wiring, env files, volumes or networks
- [ ] Service integration
- [ ] Caddy / HTTPS / proxy overlay
- [ ] `stack-check.sh`
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Specific service: ...

**Current workaround**
Describe any workaround you are using today, if applicable.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the enhancement request here.
